creator: tj+freebsd_bugs@a13.fr
text:
Created attachment 179635
Remove irssi 1 patch for `irc/irssi-xmpp' port

Remove irssi 1 patch for `irc/irssi-xmpp' port

  `irc/irssi' port was updated to version 1.0.0 in bug 215800, but later
downgraded to previous version. In the mean time, `irc/irssi-xmpp' port
was patched to support irssi 1 only, but it does not build anymore after
irssi port downgrade.
